purposes.out: {name} sets out for {dest} to visit kin.
purposes.back: {name} comes home from {dest}, glad of family.

purposes.out: {name} sets off on a pilgrimage to {dest}.
purposes.back: {name} returns from a pilgrimage to {dest}, at peace.

purposes.out: {name} loads a pack and heads to {dest} to trade.
purposes.back: {name} returns from {dest} with a fuller purse and fresh gossip.

purposes.out: {name} wanders off toward {dest}, restless for once.
purposes.back: {name} wanders back from {dest}, full of road-tales.
{name} finishes an errand to {dest} and comes home.
